THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATKIN, CHARLES $2,284.27 PRINCIPAL, $2,284.27 INTEREST, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,596.54, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE # 722534.
